TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Weikes ising == Weikes (Inkiris: Joseph Wilkerson, 1913 miheca 9 folad 15 romi'ad – 2001 miheca 6 folad 11 romi'ad), Mitokaday ising (wayke), halafin ko kaitini i Canghua Kristokiw isingan ato fafahi ko tayal i isingan, saka 8 rekad isingan pacakat a kompay. Da'oc no 'orip. 'Ayaway miheca a 'orip Weikes ising (Joseph Wilkerson), I 1913 miheca masofoc i Durham niyaro' i North Carolina no Amilika. Kaemangan ho mitelek to sakalafoksian, ikor mafana' to matemoyay ko niyah, caay ka tatodong ka'ayaw no 'alomanay papelo. Tona misawad nai Maryville kakoyin no Tennessee huasyi pinanam, mala isingan sinting, maala to Virginia daykako ising kakoyin. Misawad nai Virginia daykako ising kakoyin. Itira i Amilika minanam to pilafinan ising, saan matatama kalaloodan no Dipong to Pearl Harbor, matahidang malasofitay, itira to i kalasofitayan citodong t okakeridan a ising . Paherek k okalasofitay minokay tayra i niyaro', o sapilaheciaw to sakala midingtoay ising i Congko, itira i 1947 miheca ato kalofafahi ci Wei Ailun tayra i Yale daykako minanam to no kowaping a sowal, I 1948 miheca mararamod cangra . Tayni Taywan Sacifaloco' sa ci Weikes ising to sakatayniaw i pasawali a niyaro' malaising, malepon ningra ko kai Amilika minanam to saki pitokad isingan i, i 1953 miheca tayni cingra i Taywan, kadadoedo i Pintong, Ciayi Kristokiw isingan ato Taypi Makay isingan patado ko tayal, saka tosa miheca matahidang ni Lan Tapi, citodong kakeridan no tokadan ising, pacarcar haca to micokeray to kakeridan a yinciw . Mipaini ko mitomadaway to kanga'ayan a isi no Cangci ci Huang Fengmei i, o satadamaanay to sakitokadan ising ci Weikes ising itiyaay miheca, hawikiden ningra ko nai Amilikaay a pitokad sadipot kakokay kapolongan sapadama a fana', nai cingraan ko kafana' to masarocoday no adadaay harateng sapilaheci no dademaken . Paini ko kakeridan no tokadan no Cangci ci Chen Shoudong, sa'ayaway naikoran no lalood i, sasifo'an no Taywan to ma'epiay wawa, mangasanay ato mafala'ay adadaay to kaledefan i, masarocoday fana' ni Weikes singsi (ising) ko pisalof mitokad, saka nga'ay ko ma'epiay ato matakonolay adadaay, caay to kada'ocan ko minafoyay ko 'orip, o nano para' ko saka saselic, misapi'ipi'iway ko kadademak a adadaay i, manga'ay mo'ecel ko tatirengan a romakat . Ira ko 27 mihecaan ko kaitira i Canghua Kristokiw isingan ko patado ningra, tadamaan ko pikihar ningra to mafala'ay, pakayni i pitokad isingan pitokad, masalof ko tatirengan no ma'epiay maliwetay ko tireng a adadaay . Itiraay i Canghuasi Tapolo patirengay to Leandro Maryknoll isingan ci liande ising, patayraen ningra ko adaday paising . Citodongay to Cangci ciolahay fanges ci Chen Meiling sawal sa, i 1950 mihecaan masapakoyoc, manikaw cango'ot ko isingan no Taywan itiya, nika pahanhanan ni Weikes ising militado cingta tayra i ta'akay isingan no Amilika padoedo minanam, tosa miheca ko pinanam no falohang pitokad ato cecay miheca ira ko pankiw to cefoan tokad a pinanaman, o sapadamso' to sasifo'an no Taywan to saki falohang a tokad, cefoan tokadan, okak tokadan ato sapisalof palolol no fanges a tokad patado . O niyah sa ko midemakay, tinako padamso'an no roma kitakit a sapipa'el a kikay, ma'epiay wawa a satoka', marar a koco', misanga' sapasifana' no isingan . Sacisowal sa to kalita'angan ko kakeridan no tokadan no Cangci ci Chen Shoudong, o niyah sa ci Weikes ising ko misilsilay to sapidemak to sapitokad a rayray, tada masapinang nengnengen . Ci Weikes ising i Cangci matelek to kosaki matayalay isingan 'ayaw no sapipa'el, patokad to adadaay, I'ayaw ko pitolon to adadaay a rocok. Na tayni ci Lin Jieshan i Cangci minanam to sakalaising, mitoor to po'ot i saka cecay romi'ad i, mitengil cingra to pitolon ni Weikes ising, laloma' no pitolon misapo'eneray to cango'ot no 'icel, milongoc ko sini'ada no Kawas to adadaay, mapadama ranikay ko kanga'ay. Pasowal ci Lin Jieshan, o pidemak ni Weikes ising to madoka'ay ko fitoka, ci fokelohay tira', matakonolay kacifala', fotolan pitolad, tangasa i malingaroyay, matefaday ko taisi'an ato awaayay ko samiyot pisalof a tokad, halo fafahiyan a tokad, awaay ko sapipaliyasaw. Kahiratengan ni Lin Jieshan, mitoor ci Weikes isingan a pitokadan, adihay ko masootay no fasal ko tina'I a kaemangay wawa, caayho pikecec to kalaw, hadidi saan misahacecay miala pasadak . O fafahi sa ni Weikes ising ci Wei Ailun itira cingra i kakeridan no kangkoho no Cangci, mala citodongay no kangkoho pitilidan no Cangci cingra, mapalahad to ko semo'etay kakeridan no kangkoho no Cangci . O nipafelian no kiwkay a kucukaysing i pafelien ni Weikes ising ko pakoyocay adadaay tamdaw, ano ira ko cango'otay to payso to sapafeli to sapaising, cingra ko patakangay, saan patireng cingra to saki pakoyocay adadaay a kiking, padama to pakoyocay tamdaw . Patodong to cecay lipay a romi'ad padama to Poli Kristokiw isingan pitokadan, mapadang ko masereday lotokay niyaro' sa'etal, yincumin isingan, mararid mikihar to adadaay to no wa'ayan i Pimen no Taynan, ato Pintong, Posong Kristokiw isingan adadaay . I 1977 miheca, matolo' mapatay ko saka 3 wawa ni Weikes ising, caay pakakilim to sapi nokay tala Amilika a sapikalic to hikoki, ikor masasipaini ko 'alomanay, manga'ay aca sapilaheci to pina'ang to rikor . Pinokay tayni Amilika I 11980 miheca 7 folad 1 romi'ad, o pisawadan to tayal ni Weikes ising aci Lan Tapi ising itiya. Pisawadan to ni Weikes ising talacowacowa ko tayal ningra mipadang to pipaisingan a demak, itira i Pakistan isingan patado itiya masapinang ko ka ciekang to no fotolan, minokay tayni Amilika paising . I 1998 miheca i mapakaolah ci Weikes ising to saka 8 rekad isingan pipacakat kompay, pakayni kakeridan no Canghua Kristokiw isingan mararamod ci Huang Zhaosheng matahidang tayni Taywan milayap tonini pakaolahan . Toya miheca saka 4 folad 19 romi'ad midemak to 3 romi'ad pacakay to nicukaan a demak itiya, saki nianan a demak o pipatado saki Weikes isingan a payso, sapisalof to pisawad a cango'otay saka 'orip nangra . I 2000 miheca, ocoran ni Huang Zhaosheng ci Chen Shoudong ising, aci citodongay kakeridan to likisi no Cangci ci Chen Meiling tayra i North Carolina no Amilika pito'asan loma', mikihar to saki'orip na Weikes ising maramod . I 2001 miheca 6 folad 11 romi'ad miliyas to hekal ci Weikes ising a mapatay, I saka 8 folad 19 romi'ad midemak t opiharatengan ko Canghua Kristokiw isingan cingraan. Oya mata'elifay to 20 miheca a kamaro'an 'anengang ni Weikes ising minengneng to adadaay mapateli i ka'ayaw no pilipayan. Oya sito ningra ci Chen Shoudong ising sowal sa, onini a 'anengang i o nipodpodan ni Weikes ising, itini tonini 'anengan i, mapa'orip ko pina:ay 'orip tamdaw no Taywan, mahinom ko 'alomanay ciadadaay faloco' no adadaay, caayay pikaloya a 'orip, nipafaloco'an ko pinga'ay ira mihirateng, anini onini a tawki nonini a 'anengang i, awaayto itini hekal .
S.PHON: == wəikəs isiŋ == wəikəs (inkiris: *o~usəpħ wiɾkərso~un, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ (wajkə), ħaɾafin ko~u kaitini i ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan ato~u fafaħi ko~u tajaɾ i isiŋan, saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ isiŋan paʦakat a ko~umpaj. ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip. ʡajawaj miħəʦa a ʡo~urip wəikəs isiŋ (*o~usəpħ wiɾkərso~un), i **** miħəʦa maso~ufo~uʦ i ɬ~ɮo~u~urħam nijaro~uʡ i no~urtħ ʦaro~uɾina no~u amiɾika. kaəmaŋan ħo~u mitəɾək to~u sakaɾafo~uksian, iko~ur mafanaʡ to~u matəmo~ujaj ko~u nijaħ, ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kaʡajaw no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj papəɾo~u. to~una misawaɬ~ɮ nai marjb~viɾɾə kako~ujin no~u tənnəssəə ħo~u~uasji pinanam, maɾa isiŋan sintiŋ, maaɾa to~u b~vir*inia ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋ kako~ujin. misawaɬ~ɮ nai b~vir*inia ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋ kako~ujin. itira i amiɾika minanam to~u piɾafinan isiŋ, saan matatama kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u pəarɾ ħarb~b~vo~ur, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ maɾaso~ufitaj, itira to~u i kaɾaso~ufitajan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ t o~ukakəriɬ~ɮan a isiŋ . paħərək k o~ukaɾaso~ufitaj mino~ukaj tajra i nijaro~uʡ, o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw to~u sakaɾa miɬ~ɮiŋto~uaj isiŋ i ʦo~uŋko~u, itira i **** miħəʦa ato~u kaɾo~ufafaħi ʦi wəi aiɾo~u~un tajra i jaɾə ɬ~ɮajkako~u minanam to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ, i **** miħəʦa mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra . tajni tajwan saʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sa ʦi wəikəs isiŋ to~u sakatajniaw i pasawaɾi a nijaro~uʡ maɾaisiŋ, maɾəpo~un niŋra ko~u kai amiɾika minanam to~u saki pito~ukaɬ~ɮ isiŋan i, i **** miħəʦa tajni ʦiŋra i tajwan, kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u i pinto~uŋ, ʦiaji kristo~ukiw isiŋan ato~u tajpi makaj isiŋan pataɬ~ɮo~u ko~u tajaɾ, saka to~usa miħəʦa mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ni ɾan tapi, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u to~ukaɬ~ɮan isiŋ, paʦarʦar ħaʦa to~u miʦo~ukəraj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan a jinʦiw . mipaini ko~u mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj to~u kaŋaʡajan a isi no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ fəŋməi i, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj to~u sakito~ukaɬ~ɮan isiŋ ʦi wəikəs isiŋ itijaaj miħəʦa, ħawikiɬ~ɮən niŋra ko~u nai amiɾikaaj a pito~ukaɬ~ɮ saɬ~ɮipo~ut kako~ukaj kapo~uɾo~uŋan sapaɬ~ɮama a fanaʡ, nai ʦiŋraan ko~u kafanaʡ to~u masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ħaratəŋ sapiɾaħəʦi no~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən . paini ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u to~ukaɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, saʡajawaj naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, sasifo~uʡan no~u tajwan to~u maʡəpiaj wawa, maŋasanaj ato~u mafaɾaʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u kaɾəɬ~ɮəfan i, masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj fanaʡ ni wəikəs siŋsi (isiŋ) ko~u pisaɾo~uf mito~ukaɬ~ɮ, saka ŋaʡaj ko~u maʡəpiaj ato~u matako~uno~uɾaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ʦaaj to~u kaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦan ko~u minafo~ujaj ko~u ʡo~urip, o~u nano~u paraʡ ko~u saka sasəɾiʦ, misapiʡipiʡiwaj ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj i, maŋaʡaj mo~uʡəʦəɾ ko~u tatirəŋan a ro~umakat . ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan ko~u kaitira i ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan ko~u pataɬ~ɮo~u niŋra, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u pikiħar niŋra to~u mafaɾaʡaj, pakajni i pito~ukaɬ~ɮ isiŋan pito~ukaɬ~ɮ, masaɾo~uf ko~u tatirəŋan no~u maʡəpiaj maɾiwətaj ko~u tirəŋ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj . itiraaj i ʦaŋħo~u~uasi tapo~uɾo~u patirəŋaj to~u ɾəanɬ~ɮro~u marjkno~uɾɾ isiŋan ʦi ɾianɬ~ɮə isiŋ, patajraən niŋra ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj paisiŋ . ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ʦaŋʦi ʦio~uɾaħaj faŋəs ʦi ʦħən məiɾiŋ sawaɾ sa, i **** miħəʦaan masapako~ujo~uʦ, manikaw ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u isiŋan no~u tajwan itija, nika paħanħanan ni wəikəs isiŋ miɾitaɬ~ɮo~u ʦiŋta tajra i taʡakaj isiŋan no~u amiɾika paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u minanam, to~usa miħəʦa ko~u pinanam no~u faɾo~uħaŋ pito~ukaɬ~ɮ ato~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦa ira ko~u pankiw to~u ʦəfo~uan to~ukaɬ~ɮ a pinanaman, o~u sapaɬ~ɮamso~uʡ to~u sasifo~uʡan no~u tajwan to~u saki faɾo~uħaŋ a to~ukaɬ~ɮ, ʦəfo~uan to~ukaɬ~ɮan, o~ukak to~ukaɬ~ɮan ato~u sapisaɾo~uf paɾo~uɾo~uɾ no~u faŋəs a to~ukaɬ~ɮ pataɬ~ɮo~u . o~u nijaħ sa ko~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj, tinako~u paɬ~ɮamso~uʡan no~u ro~uma kitakit a sapipaʡəɾ a kikaj, maʡəpiaj wawa a sato~ukaʡ, marar a ko~uʦo~uʡ, misaŋaʡ sapasifanaʡ no~u isiŋan . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa to~u kaɾitaʡaŋan ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u to~ukaɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, o~u nijaħ sa ʦi wəikəs isiŋ ko~u misiɾsiɾaj to~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak to~u sapito~ukaɬ~ɮ a rajraj, taɬ~ɮa masapinaŋ nəŋnəŋən . ʦi wəikəs isiŋ i ʦaŋʦi matəɾək to~u ko~usaki matajaɾaj isiŋan ʡajaw no~u sapipaʡəɾ, pato~ukaɬ~ɮ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, iʡajaw ko~u pito~uɾo~un to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a ro~uʦo~uk. na tajni ʦi ɾin *iəsħan i ʦaŋʦi minanam to~u sakaɾaisiŋ, mito~uo~ur to~u po~uʡo~ut i saka ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, mitəŋiɾ ʦiŋra to~u pito~uɾo~un ni wəikəs isiŋ, ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u pito~uɾo~un misapo~uʡənəraj to~u ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u ʡiʦəɾ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa no~u kawas to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, mapaɬ~ɮama ranikaj ko~u kaŋaʡaj. paso~uwaɾ ʦi ɾin *iəsħan, o~u piɬ~ɮəmak ni wəikəs isiŋ to~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj ko~u fito~uka, ʦi fo~ukəɾo~uħaj tiraʡ, matako~uno~uɾaj kaʦifaɾaʡ, fo~uto~uɾan pito~uɾaɬ~ɮ, taŋasa i maɾiŋaro~ujaj, matəfaɬ~ɮaj ko~u taisiʡan ato~u awaajaj ko~u samijo~ut pisaɾo~uf a to~ukaɬ~ɮ, ħaɾo~u fafaħijan a to~ukaɬ~ɮ, awaaj ko~u sapipaɾijasaw. kaħiratəŋan ni ɾin *iəsħan, mito~uo~ur ʦi wəikəs isiŋan a pito~ukaɬ~ɮan, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u maso~uo~utaj no~u fasaɾ ko~u tinaʡi a kaəmaŋaj wawa, ʦaajħo~u pikəʦəʦ to~u kaɾaw, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi saan misaħaʦəʦaj miaɾa pasaɬ~ɮak . o~u fafaħi sa ni wəikəs isiŋ ʦi wəi aiɾo~u~un itira ʦiŋra i kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaŋko~uħo~u no~u ʦaŋʦi, maɾa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u kaŋko~uħo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦiŋra, mapaɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u səmo~uʡətaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaŋko~uħo~u no~u ʦaŋʦi . o~u nipafəɾian no~u kiwkaj a ko~u~uʦo~u~ukajsiŋ i pafəɾiən ni wəikəs isiŋ ko~u pako~ujo~uʦaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u ira ko~u ʦaŋo~uʡo~utaj to~u pajso~u to~u sapafəɾi to~u sapaisiŋ, ʦiŋra ko~u patakaŋaj, saan patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u saki pako~ujo~uʦaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a kikiŋ, paɬ~ɮama to~u pako~ujo~uʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw . pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮama to~u po~uɾi kristo~ukiw isiŋan pito~ukaɬ~ɮan, mapaɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u masərəɬ~ɮaj ɾo~uto~ukaj nijaro~uʡ saʡətaɾ, jinʦo~u~umin isiŋan, marariɬ~ɮ mikiħar to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u no~u waʡajan i pimən no~u tajnan, ato~u pinto~uŋ, po~uso~uŋ kristo~ukiw isiŋan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj . i **** miħəʦa, mato~uɾo~uʡ mapataj ko~u saka * wawa ni wəikəs isiŋ, ʦaaj pakakiɾim to~u sapi no~ukaj taɾa amiɾika a sapikaɾiʦ to~u ħiko~uki, iko~ur masasipaini ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, maŋaʡaj aʦa sapiɾaħəʦi to~u pinaʡaŋ to~u riko~ur . pino~ukaj tajni amiɾika i ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u pisawaɬ~ɮan to~u tajaɾ ni wəikəs isiŋ aʦi ɾan tapi isiŋ itija. pisawaɬ~ɮan to~u ni wəikəs isiŋ taɾaʦo~uwaʦo~uwa ko~u tajaɾ niŋra mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u pipaisiŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, itira i pakistan isiŋan pataɬ~ɮo~u itija masapinaŋ ko~u ka ʦiəkaŋ to~u no~u fo~uto~uɾan, mino~ukaj tajni amiɾika paisiŋ . i **** miħəʦa i mapakao~uɾaħ ʦi wəikəs isiŋ to~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ isiŋan pipaʦakat ko~umpaj, pakajni kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~usħəŋ mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ tajni tajwan miɾajap to~unini pakao~uɾaħan . to~uja miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paʦakaj to~u niʦo~u~ukaan a ɬ~ɮəmak itija, saki nianan a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u pipataɬ~ɮo~u saki wəikəs isiŋan a pajso~u, sapisaɾo~uf to~u pisawaɬ~ɮ a ʦaŋo~uʡo~utaj saka ʡo~urip naŋra . i **** miħəʦa, o~uʦo~uran ni ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~usħəŋ ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ isiŋ, aʦi ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan to~u ɾikisi no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ʦħən məiɾiŋ tajra i no~urtħ ʦaro~uɾina no~u amiɾika pito~uʡasan ɾo~umaʡ, mikiħar to~u sakiʡo~urip na wəikəs isiŋ maramo~uɬ~ɮ . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ ʦi wəikəs isiŋ a mapataj, i saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak t o~upiħaratəŋan ko~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan ʦiŋraan. o~uja mataʡəɾifaj to~u ** miħəʦa a kamaro~uʡan ʡanəŋaŋ ni wəikəs isiŋ minəŋnəŋ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mapatəɾi i kaʡajaw no~u piɾipajan. o~uja sito~u niŋra ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ isiŋ so~uwaɾ sa, o~unini a ʡanəŋaŋ i o~u nipo~uɬ~ɮpo~uɬ~ɮan ni wəikəs isiŋ, itini to~unini ʡanəŋan i, mapaʡo~urip ko~u pina:aj ʡo~urip tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, maħino~um ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ʦaajaj pikaɾo~uja a ʡo~urip, nipafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ko~u piŋaʡaj ira miħiratəŋ, anini o~unini a tawki no~unini a ʡanəŋaŋ i, awaajto~u itini ħəkaɾ .
S.FORM: == Weikes ising == Weikes (Inkiris: Joseph Wilkerson, 1913 miheca 9 folad 15 romi'ad – 2001 miheca 6 folad 11 romi'ad), Mitokaday ising (wayke), halafin ko kaitini i Canghua Kristokiw isingan ato fafahi ko tayal i isingan, saka 8 rekad isingan pacakat a kompay. Da'oc no 'orip. 'Ayaway miheca a 'orip Weikes ising (Joseph Wilkerson), I 1913 miheca masofoc i Durham niyaro' i North Carolina no Amilika. Kaemangan ho mitelek to sakalafoksian, ikor mafana' to matemoyay ko niyah, caay ka tatodong ka'ayaw no 'alomanay papelo. Tona misawad nai Maryville kakoyin no Tennessee huasyi pinanam, mala isingan sinting, maala to Virginia daykako ising kakoyin. Misawad nai Virginia daykako ising kakoyin. Itira i Amilika minanam to pilafinan ising, saan matatama kalaloodan no Dipong to Pearl Harbor, matahidang malasofitay, itira to i kalasofitayan citodong t okakeridan a ising . Paherek k okalasofitay minokay tayra i niyaro', o sapilaheciaw to sakala midingtoay ising i Congko, itira i 1947 miheca ato kalofafahi ci Wei Ailun tayra i Yale daykako minanam to no kowaping a sowal, I 1948 miheca mararamod cangra . Tayni Taywan Sacifaloco' sa ci Weikes ising to sakatayniaw i pasawali a niyaro' malaising, malepon ningra ko kai Amilika minanam to saki pitokad isingan i, i 1953 miheca tayni cingra i Taywan, kadadoedo i Pintong, Ciayi Kristokiw isingan ato Taypi Makay isingan patado ko tayal, saka tosa miheca matahidang ni Lan Tapi, citodong kakeridan no tokadan ising, pacarcar haca to micokeray to kakeridan a yinciw . Mipaini ko mitomadaway to kanga'ayan a isi no Cangci ci Huang Fengmei i, o satadamaanay to sakitokadan ising ci Weikes ising itiyaay miheca, hawikiden ningra ko nai Amilikaay a pitokad sadipot kakokay kapolongan sapadama a fana', nai cingraan ko kafana' to masarocoday no adadaay harateng sapilaheci no dademaken . Paini ko kakeridan no tokadan no Cangci ci Chen Shoudong, sa'ayaway naikoran no lalood i, sasifo'an no Taywan to ma'epiay wawa, mangasanay ato mafala'ay adadaay to kaledefan i, masarocoday fana' ni Weikes singsi (ising) ko pisalof mitokad, saka nga'ay ko ma'epiay ato matakonolay adadaay, caay to kada'ocan ko minafoyay ko 'orip, o nano para' ko saka saselic, misapi'ipi'iway ko kadademak a adadaay i, manga'ay mo'ecel ko tatirengan a romakat . Ira ko 27 mihecaan ko kaitira i Canghua Kristokiw isingan ko patado ningra, tadamaan ko pikihar ningra to mafala'ay, pakayni i pitokad isingan pitokad, masalof ko tatirengan no ma'epiay maliwetay ko tireng a adadaay . Itiraay i Canghuasi Tapolo patirengay to Leandro Maryknoll isingan ci liande ising, patayraen ningra ko adaday paising . Citodongay to Cangci ciolahay fanges ci Chen Meiling sawal sa, i 1950 mihecaan masapakoyoc, manikaw cango'ot ko isingan no Taywan itiya, nika pahanhanan ni Weikes ising militado cingta tayra i ta'akay isingan no Amilika padoedo minanam, tosa miheca ko pinanam no falohang pitokad ato cecay miheca ira ko pankiw to cefoan tokad a pinanaman, o sapadamso' to sasifo'an no Taywan to saki falohang a tokad, cefoan tokadan, okak tokadan ato sapisalof palolol no fanges a tokad patado . O niyah sa ko midemakay, tinako padamso'an no roma kitakit a sapipa'el a kikay, ma'epiay wawa a satoka', marar a koco', misanga' sapasifana' no isingan . Sacisowal sa to kalita'angan ko kakeridan no tokadan no Cangci ci Chen Shoudong, o niyah sa ci Weikes ising ko misilsilay to sapidemak to sapitokad a rayray, tada masapinang nengnengen . Ci Weikes ising i Cangci matelek to kosaki matayalay isingan 'ayaw no sapipa'el, patokad to adadaay, I'ayaw ko pitolon to adadaay a rocok. Na tayni ci Lin Jieshan i Cangci minanam to sakalaising, mitoor to po'ot i saka cecay romi'ad i, mitengil cingra to pitolon ni Weikes ising, laloma' no pitolon misapo'eneray to cango'ot no 'icel, milongoc ko sini'ada no Kawas to adadaay, mapadama ranikay ko kanga'ay. Pasowal ci Lin Jieshan, o pidemak ni Weikes ising to madoka'ay ko fitoka, ci fokelohay tira', matakonolay kacifala', fotolan pitolad, tangasa i malingaroyay, matefaday ko taisi'an ato awaayay ko samiyot pisalof a tokad, halo fafahiyan a tokad, awaay ko sapipaliyasaw. Kahiratengan ni Lin Jieshan, mitoor ci Weikes isingan a pitokadan, adihay ko masootay no fasal ko tina'I a kaemangay wawa, caayho pikecec to kalaw, hadidi saan misahacecay miala pasadak . O fafahi sa ni Weikes ising ci Wei Ailun itira cingra i kakeridan no kangkoho no Cangci, mala citodongay no kangkoho pitilidan no Cangci cingra, mapalahad to ko semo'etay kakeridan no kangkoho no Cangci . O nipafelian no kiwkay a kucukaysing i pafelien ni Weikes ising ko pakoyocay adadaay tamdaw, ano ira ko cango'otay to payso to sapafeli to sapaising, cingra ko patakangay, saan patireng cingra to saki pakoyocay adadaay a kiking, padama to pakoyocay tamdaw . Patodong to cecay lipay a romi'ad padama to Poli Kristokiw isingan pitokadan, mapadang ko masereday lotokay niyaro' sa'etal, yincumin isingan, mararid mikihar to adadaay to no wa'ayan i Pimen no Taynan, ato Pintong, Posong Kristokiw isingan adadaay . I 1977 miheca, matolo' mapatay ko saka 3 wawa ni Weikes ising, caay pakakilim to sapi nokay tala Amilika a sapikalic to hikoki, ikor masasipaini ko 'alomanay, manga'ay aca sapilaheci to pina'ang to rikor . Pinokay tayni Amilika I 11980 miheca 7 folad 1 romi'ad, o pisawadan to tayal ni Weikes ising aci Lan Tapi ising itiya. Pisawadan to ni Weikes ising talacowacowa ko tayal ningra mipadang to pipaisingan a demak, itira i Pakistan isingan patado itiya masapinang ko ka ciekang to no fotolan, minokay tayni Amilika paising . I 1998 miheca i mapakaolah ci Weikes ising to saka 8 rekad isingan pipacakat kompay, pakayni kakeridan no Canghua Kristokiw isingan mararamod ci Huang Zhaosheng matahidang tayni Taywan milayap tonini pakaolahan . Toya miheca saka 4 folad 19 romi'ad midemak to 3 romi'ad pacakay to nicukaan a demak itiya, saki nianan a demak o pipatado saki Weikes isingan a payso, sapisalof to pisawad a cango'otay saka 'orip nangra . I 2000 miheca, ocoran ni Huang Zhaosheng ci Chen Shoudong ising, aci citodongay kakeridan to likisi no Cangci ci Chen Meiling tayra i North Carolina no Amilika pito'asan loma', mikihar to saki'orip na Weikes ising maramod . I 2001 miheca 6 folad 11 romi'ad miliyas to hekal ci Weikes ising a mapatay, I saka 8 folad 19 romi'ad midemak t opiharatengan ko Canghua Kristokiw isingan cingraan. Oya mata'elifay to 20 miheca a kamaro'an 'anengang ni Weikes ising minengneng to adadaay mapateli i ka'ayaw no pilipayan. Oya sito ningra ci Chen Shoudong ising sowal sa, onini a 'anengang i o nipodpodan ni Weikes ising, itini tonini 'anengan i, mapa'orip ko pina:ay 'orip tamdaw no Taywan, mahinom ko 'alomanay ciadadaay faloco' no adadaay, caayay pikaloya a 'orip, nipafaloco'an ko pinga'ay ira mihirateng, anini onini a tawki nonini a 'anengang i, awaayto itini hekal .
S.PHON: == wəikəs isiŋ == wəikəs (inkiris: *o~usəpħ wiɾkərso~un, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ (wajkə), ħaɾafin ko~u kaitini i ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan ato~u fafaħi ko~u tajaɾ i isiŋan, saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ isiŋan paʦakat a ko~umpaj. ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip. ʡajawaj miħəʦa a ʡo~urip wəikəs isiŋ (*o~usəpħ wiɾkərso~un), i **** miħəʦa maso~ufo~uʦ i ɬ~ɮo~u~urħam nijaro~uʡ i no~urtħ ʦaro~uɾina no~u amiɾika. kaəmaŋan ħo~u mitəɾək to~u sakaɾafo~uksian, iko~ur mafanaʡ to~u matəmo~ujaj ko~u nijaħ, ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kaʡajaw no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj papəɾo~u. to~una misawaɬ~ɮ nai marjb~viɾɾə kako~ujin no~u tənnəssəə ħo~u~uasji pinanam, maɾa isiŋan sintiŋ, maaɾa to~u b~vir*inia ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋ kako~ujin. misawaɬ~ɮ nai b~vir*inia ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋ kako~ujin. itira i amiɾika minanam to~u piɾafinan isiŋ, saan matatama kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u pəarɾ ħarb~b~vo~ur, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ maɾaso~ufitaj, itira to~u i kaɾaso~ufitajan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ t o~ukakəriɬ~ɮan a isiŋ . paħərək k o~ukaɾaso~ufitaj mino~ukaj tajra i nijaro~uʡ, o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw to~u sakaɾa miɬ~ɮiŋto~uaj isiŋ i ʦo~uŋko~u, itira i **** miħəʦa ato~u kaɾo~ufafaħi ʦi wəi aiɾo~u~un tajra i jaɾə ɬ~ɮajkako~u minanam to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ, i **** miħəʦa mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra . tajni tajwan saʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sa ʦi wəikəs isiŋ to~u sakatajniaw i pasawaɾi a nijaro~uʡ maɾaisiŋ, maɾəpo~un niŋra ko~u kai amiɾika minanam to~u saki pito~ukaɬ~ɮ isiŋan i, i **** miħəʦa tajni ʦiŋra i tajwan, kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u i pinto~uŋ, ʦiaji kristo~ukiw isiŋan ato~u tajpi makaj isiŋan pataɬ~ɮo~u ko~u tajaɾ, saka to~usa miħəʦa mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ni ɾan tapi, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u to~ukaɬ~ɮan isiŋ, paʦarʦar ħaʦa to~u miʦo~ukəraj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan a jinʦiw . mipaini ko~u mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj to~u kaŋaʡajan a isi no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ fəŋməi i, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj to~u sakito~ukaɬ~ɮan isiŋ ʦi wəikəs isiŋ itijaaj miħəʦa, ħawikiɬ~ɮən niŋra ko~u nai amiɾikaaj a pito~ukaɬ~ɮ saɬ~ɮipo~ut kako~ukaj kapo~uɾo~uŋan sapaɬ~ɮama a fanaʡ, nai ʦiŋraan ko~u kafanaʡ to~u masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ħaratəŋ sapiɾaħəʦi no~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən . paini ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u to~ukaɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, saʡajawaj naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, sasifo~uʡan no~u tajwan to~u maʡəpiaj wawa, maŋasanaj ato~u mafaɾaʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u kaɾəɬ~ɮəfan i, masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj fanaʡ ni wəikəs siŋsi (isiŋ) ko~u pisaɾo~uf mito~ukaɬ~ɮ, saka ŋaʡaj ko~u maʡəpiaj ato~u matako~uno~uɾaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ʦaaj to~u kaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦan ko~u minafo~ujaj ko~u ʡo~urip, o~u nano~u paraʡ ko~u saka sasəɾiʦ, misapiʡipiʡiwaj ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj i, maŋaʡaj mo~uʡəʦəɾ ko~u tatirəŋan a ro~umakat . ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan ko~u kaitira i ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan ko~u pataɬ~ɮo~u niŋra, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u pikiħar niŋra to~u mafaɾaʡaj, pakajni i pito~ukaɬ~ɮ isiŋan pito~ukaɬ~ɮ, masaɾo~uf ko~u tatirəŋan no~u maʡəpiaj maɾiwətaj ko~u tirəŋ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj . itiraaj i ʦaŋħo~u~uasi tapo~uɾo~u patirəŋaj to~u ɾəanɬ~ɮro~u marjkno~uɾɾ isiŋan ʦi ɾianɬ~ɮə isiŋ, patajraən niŋra ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj paisiŋ . ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ʦaŋʦi ʦio~uɾaħaj faŋəs ʦi ʦħən məiɾiŋ sawaɾ sa, i **** miħəʦaan masapako~ujo~uʦ, manikaw ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u isiŋan no~u tajwan itija, nika paħanħanan ni wəikəs isiŋ miɾitaɬ~ɮo~u ʦiŋta tajra i taʡakaj isiŋan no~u amiɾika paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u minanam, to~usa miħəʦa ko~u pinanam no~u faɾo~uħaŋ pito~ukaɬ~ɮ ato~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦa ira ko~u pankiw to~u ʦəfo~uan to~ukaɬ~ɮ a pinanaman, o~u sapaɬ~ɮamso~uʡ to~u sasifo~uʡan no~u tajwan to~u saki faɾo~uħaŋ a to~ukaɬ~ɮ, ʦəfo~uan to~ukaɬ~ɮan, o~ukak to~ukaɬ~ɮan ato~u sapisaɾo~uf paɾo~uɾo~uɾ no~u faŋəs a to~ukaɬ~ɮ pataɬ~ɮo~u . o~u nijaħ sa ko~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj, tinako~u paɬ~ɮamso~uʡan no~u ro~uma kitakit a sapipaʡəɾ a kikaj, maʡəpiaj wawa a sato~ukaʡ, marar a ko~uʦo~uʡ, misaŋaʡ sapasifanaʡ no~u isiŋan . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa to~u kaɾitaʡaŋan ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u to~ukaɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, o~u nijaħ sa ʦi wəikəs isiŋ ko~u misiɾsiɾaj to~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak to~u sapito~ukaɬ~ɮ a rajraj, taɬ~ɮa masapinaŋ nəŋnəŋən . ʦi wəikəs isiŋ i ʦaŋʦi matəɾək to~u ko~usaki matajaɾaj isiŋan ʡajaw no~u sapipaʡəɾ, pato~ukaɬ~ɮ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, iʡajaw ko~u pito~uɾo~un to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a ro~uʦo~uk. na tajni ʦi ɾin *iəsħan i ʦaŋʦi minanam to~u sakaɾaisiŋ, mito~uo~ur to~u po~uʡo~ut i saka ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, mitəŋiɾ ʦiŋra to~u pito~uɾo~un ni wəikəs isiŋ, ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u pito~uɾo~un misapo~uʡənəraj to~u ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u ʡiʦəɾ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa no~u kawas to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, mapaɬ~ɮama ranikaj ko~u kaŋaʡaj. paso~uwaɾ ʦi ɾin *iəsħan, o~u piɬ~ɮəmak ni wəikəs isiŋ to~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj ko~u fito~uka, ʦi fo~ukəɾo~uħaj tiraʡ, matako~uno~uɾaj kaʦifaɾaʡ, fo~uto~uɾan pito~uɾaɬ~ɮ, taŋasa i maɾiŋaro~ujaj, matəfaɬ~ɮaj ko~u taisiʡan ato~u awaajaj ko~u samijo~ut pisaɾo~uf a to~ukaɬ~ɮ, ħaɾo~u fafaħijan a to~ukaɬ~ɮ, awaaj ko~u sapipaɾijasaw. kaħiratəŋan ni ɾin *iəsħan, mito~uo~ur ʦi wəikəs isiŋan a pito~ukaɬ~ɮan, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u maso~uo~utaj no~u fasaɾ ko~u tinaʡi a kaəmaŋaj wawa, ʦaajħo~u pikəʦəʦ to~u kaɾaw, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi saan misaħaʦəʦaj miaɾa pasaɬ~ɮak . o~u fafaħi sa ni wəikəs isiŋ ʦi wəi aiɾo~u~un itira ʦiŋra i kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaŋko~uħo~u no~u ʦaŋʦi, maɾa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u kaŋko~uħo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦiŋra, mapaɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u səmo~uʡətaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaŋko~uħo~u no~u ʦaŋʦi . o~u nipafəɾian no~u kiwkaj a ko~u~uʦo~u~ukajsiŋ i pafəɾiən ni wəikəs isiŋ ko~u pako~ujo~uʦaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u ira ko~u ʦaŋo~uʡo~utaj to~u pajso~u to~u sapafəɾi to~u sapaisiŋ, ʦiŋra ko~u patakaŋaj, saan patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u saki pako~ujo~uʦaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a kikiŋ, paɬ~ɮama to~u pako~ujo~uʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw . pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮama to~u po~uɾi kristo~ukiw isiŋan pito~ukaɬ~ɮan, mapaɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u masərəɬ~ɮaj ɾo~uto~ukaj nijaro~uʡ saʡətaɾ, jinʦo~u~umin isiŋan, marariɬ~ɮ mikiħar to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u no~u waʡajan i pimən no~u tajnan, ato~u pinto~uŋ, po~uso~uŋ kristo~ukiw isiŋan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj . i **** miħəʦa, mato~uɾo~uʡ mapataj ko~u saka * wawa ni wəikəs isiŋ, ʦaaj pakakiɾim to~u sapi no~ukaj taɾa amiɾika a sapikaɾiʦ to~u ħiko~uki, iko~ur masasipaini ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, maŋaʡaj aʦa sapiɾaħəʦi to~u pinaʡaŋ to~u riko~ur . pino~ukaj tajni amiɾika i ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u pisawaɬ~ɮan to~u tajaɾ ni wəikəs isiŋ aʦi ɾan tapi isiŋ itija. pisawaɬ~ɮan to~u ni wəikəs isiŋ taɾaʦo~uwaʦo~uwa ko~u tajaɾ niŋra mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u pipaisiŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, itira i pakistan isiŋan pataɬ~ɮo~u itija masapinaŋ ko~u ka ʦiəkaŋ to~u no~u fo~uto~uɾan, mino~ukaj tajni amiɾika paisiŋ . i **** miħəʦa i mapakao~uɾaħ ʦi wəikəs isiŋ to~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ isiŋan pipaʦakat ko~umpaj, pakajni kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~usħəŋ mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ tajni tajwan miɾajap to~unini pakao~uɾaħan . to~uja miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paʦakaj to~u niʦo~u~ukaan a ɬ~ɮəmak itija, saki nianan a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u pipataɬ~ɮo~u saki wəikəs isiŋan a pajso~u, sapisaɾo~uf to~u pisawaɬ~ɮ a ʦaŋo~uʡo~utaj saka ʡo~urip naŋra . i **** miħəʦa, o~uʦo~uran ni ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~usħəŋ ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ isiŋ, aʦi ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan to~u ɾikisi no~u ʦaŋʦi ʦi ʦħən məiɾiŋ tajra i no~urtħ ʦaro~uɾina no~u amiɾika pito~uʡasan ɾo~umaʡ, mikiħar to~u sakiʡo~urip na wəikəs isiŋ maramo~uɬ~ɮ . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ ʦi wəikəs isiŋ a mapataj, i saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak t o~upiħaratəŋan ko~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan ʦiŋraan. o~uja mataʡəɾifaj to~u ** miħəʦa a kamaro~uʡan ʡanəŋaŋ ni wəikəs isiŋ minəŋnəŋ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mapatəɾi i kaʡajaw no~u piɾipajan. o~uja sito~u niŋra ʦi ʦħən sħo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ isiŋ so~uwaɾ sa, o~unini a ʡanəŋaŋ i o~u nipo~uɬ~ɮpo~uɬ~ɮan ni wəikəs isiŋ, itini to~unini ʡanəŋan i, mapaʡo~urip ko~u pina:aj ʡo~urip tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, maħino~um ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ʦaajaj pikaɾo~uja a ʡo~urip, nipafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ko~u piŋaʡaj ira miħiratəŋ, anini o~unini a tawki no~unini a ʡanəŋaŋ i, awaajto~u itini ħəkaɾ .
